variants.title: HiFi Filter SD 70382 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 556
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SD 70382 Urea Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 556. Easy to install and replace, the SD 70382 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter U 1005 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 556
variants.description: The compact MANN-FILTER urea filters are characterized by high filter fineness, proven suitability for everyday use and a long service life. They protect system components against wear and failure and are resistant to frost and ammonia. MANN-FILTER urea filters are available for leading SCR systems in trucks and buses.
